title: U.S. Farmers Expect to Plant Record-High Soybean Acreage Planting Intentions Surpass Historic Soybean Record by 6.05 Million Acres, USDA Reports
summary: Producers surveyed across the United States intend to plant an estimated 89.5 million acres of soybeans in 2017, up 7 percent from last year and a record high, according to the Prospective Plantings report released today by the USDA’s National Agricultural Statistics Service (NASS).
